Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Wraps / Wraps

Wraps

Overview

As of May 26th 2026, there are 1,129[1] Wraps In-Game
“
Show your style.
”
— In-Game Description

Wraps are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 7. They can be used in Battle Royale, Save the World and Creative.

Wraps change the appearance of weapons and vehicles.

Additional features available for Wraps

Additional features available for Wraps[]
Animated Reactive
  • Magma was the first animated Wrap.
  • Ripe was the first reactive Wrap.

Removed

Removed []

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Wraps' descriptions usually say “Show your Style”, but sometimes there are exceptions, such as Impasto and Hunter’s Arsenal.
  • Wraps don’t appear on most Exotic and Mythic weapons.
  • There are certain Outfits that disable wraps, such as Midas, Marigold, Shadow Midas, etc.
